refinement_sections.content: I need to figure out what the delivery routes are for the trucks. I have to make sure the trucks deliver packages on time and use less fuel. I guess I need to know how far the trucks can go and how much fuel they use.
I have some data already, like travel times and fuel costs. I think I need to look at delivery schedules too, but I might need to guess some things since not all info is there.

I need to think about the constraints. There are time windows for deliveries, so maybe I should make sure the trucks arrive within those times. Fuel consumption is also important, so I should keep that in mind.
I think I need to make a math model. Maybe I can use equations to represent the travel times and fuel costs. I might use some kind of calculus to find the best routes.
I will assume that the data I have is mostly accurate, but since some info is missing, I might have to make some guesses. Also, I assume that the trucks can only carry a certain amount of packages.
The report should probably start with an introduction, then explain the problem and data, followed by the model I created, and finally my conclusions.
